response:
It's natural to feel insignificant at times. The path can feel long.  
Many share similar thoughts. The path is not alone.  
It's part of the human experience. The path continues.  
You are not forgotten. The path remains.  
You matter in your own way. The path is yours.  
This feeling may pass. The path is clear.  
You are part of something bigger. The path is wide.  
Take comfort in that. The path is right.  
You are not alone. The path is true.  
You are on the right path. The path is yours.
